prestazioni: L26 inline-6 engine (2.6L SOHC, 162 HP stock) rebuilt with forged internals: JE 87mm forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Tomei for 8,000 RPM reliability. Paired with a custom ground camshaft by Schrick (272° duration, 11.5mm lift) for high-RPM power delivery.

Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by HKS, feeding into a 3.5-inch titanium-wrapped downpipe and a custom 3-inch straight-pipe exhaust system with a Burns Stainless muffler for minimal backpressure. Boost controlled via a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller targeting 18 psi on 93 octane.

Custom fuel system: Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, ID1000x injectors, and a custom ECU tune by Haltech Elite 2500 with individual cylinder trimming for the L26’s uneven firing order. Auxiliary water-methanol injection by Snow Performance (Stage 3 kit) for charge cooling and detonation control, spraying a 50/50 mix of distilled water and methanol at 15 psi boost.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (260Z-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and duckbill rear wing. Front fenders extended 2 inches per side to clear 275/35/17 Toyo R888R tires on Work Meister S1 3P 17x9.5 ET12 wheels (gold finish).

Custom shaved and relocated battery to the trunk (Optima RedTop relocated with a custom aluminum mount) to improve weight distribution. Full custom aluminum firewall and rear bulkhead by ZCar Depot to reduce weight and improve chassis rigidity. Custom roll cage by Custom Cages (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) with integrated harness bar for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses.

Full custom interior by Recaro: SPG XL seats (fixed-back, carbon fiber shells) with custom red Alcantara and black leather upholstery. Custom aluminum gauge pod housing a Defi Advance BF series 3-gauge cluster (boost, oil pressure, water temp) and a Motec C127 dash for data logging. Custom aluminum door cards with billet door pulls and relocated power window switches to the center console.
